name: Artichokes & Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and trim the artichokes and beans.
2. Bring a large kettle of water to a boil and cook the artichokes until tender, about 15 minutes.
3. Add the green beans and cook for an additional 3 to 4 minutes. Drain and keep warm.
4. In a separate pan, sauté garlic in walnut oil for 1 minute.
5. Add the diced red pepper and cook until warmed through.
6. Mix all ingredients together and serve.
